English: Achievement of this goal requires a sustained annual Gross Domestic Product (GDP) growth rate of 10 percent based on the contribution of six (6) high potential business -oriented priority sectors namely Tourism and Mining, Agriculture, Manufacturing, Wholesale and Retail, Business Process outsourcing and Financial Services.
Kiswahili: Mafanikio ya lengo hili yanahitaji ukuaji endelevu wa Pato la Taifa (GDP) kwa mwaka wa asilimia 10 kulingana na mchango wa sekta sita (6) za kipaumbele zenye mwelekeo wa juu wa biashara ambazo ni Utalii na Madini, Kilimo, Uzalishaji, Jumla na Reja reja, Utoaji wa huduma za Mchakato wa Biashara na Huduma za Kifedha.

English: Micro Small and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) therefore, play a critical role as key drivers of business and economic growth, employment creation, poverty alleviation, innovation and competitiveness.
Kiswahili: Kwa hivyo, Biashara Ndogo Ndogo na za Kati (MSMEs) zina jukumu muhimu kama vichochezi muhimu vya ukuaji wa biashara na uchumi, kuunda ajira, kupunguza umaskini, uvumbuzi na ushindani.

English: According to the Economic survey of 2023, approximately 16 million persons were employed in the MSMEs sector.
Kiswahili: Kulingana na utafiti wa Kiuchumi wa 2023, takriban watu milioni 16 waliajiriwa katika sekta ya MSMEs.

English: Large number and wide distribution of MSMEs at the bottom of the pyramid implies that, if well harnessed, this sector has a high potential for favorable socio-economic impact.
Kiswahili: Idadi kubwa na usambazaji mpana wa MSMEs chini ya piramidi ina maana kwamba, ikiwa itatumika vyema, sekta hii ina uwezekano mkubwa wa matokeo mazuri ya kijamii na kiuchumi.

English: Notwithstanding the central role played by MSMEs, the businesses face many constraints that stifle their growth.
Kiswahili: Licha ya jukumu kuu linalochezwa na MSMEs, biashara zinakabiliwa na vikwazo vingi vinavyozuia ukuaji wao.

English: Global growth is projected at 3.2 percent in 2024 and 3.3 percent in 2025 from 3.3 percent in 2023.
Kiswahili: Ukuaji wa kimataifa unakadiriwa kuwa asilimia 3.2 mwaka 2024 na asilimia 3.3 mwaka 2025 kutoka asilimia 3.3 mwaka 2023.

English: The outlook reflects economic recovery in China, Euro area and UK, despite a slowdown in activity in the USA and Japan.
Kiswahili: Mtazamo huo unaonyesha kuimarika kwa uchumi nchini China, eneo la Euro na Uingereza, licha ya kudorora kwa shughuli nchini Marekani na Japan.

English: On the domestic front, the Kenyan economy is currently unwinding from layers of negative and persistent s hocks that had a structural effect on economic activities .
Kiswahili: Kwa upande wa ndani, uchumi wa Kenya kwa sasa unayumba kutoka kwa matabaka ya mambo hasi na yanayoendelea ambayo yalikuwa na athari za kimuundo kwa shughuli za kiuchumi.

Kiswahili: CPA JOHN MBADI NG’ONGO, EGH KATIBU WA BARAZA LA MAWAZIRI

English: The approved BROP will subsequently be submitted to Parliament.
Kiswahili: BROP iliyoidhinishwa itawasilishwa Bungeni baadaye.

English: In order to finalize the document, the National Treasury is expected by the provisions of the PFM Act to seek views from the institutions listed in the PFM Act, the public and any other interested persons or groups as specified in the relevant sections of the Act.
Kiswahili: Ili kukamilisha waraka huo, Hazina ya Taifa inatarajiwa kwa masharti ya Sheria ya USM kutafuta maoni kutoka kwa taasisi zilizoorodheshwa katika Sheria ya USM, umma na watu wengine wenye nia au makundi yoyote kama ilivyoainishwa katika vifungu husika vya Sheria hiyo.

English: In particular, the National Treasury is required to seek views of the following: i.
Kiswahili: Hasa, Hazina ya Taifa inatakiwa kutafuta maoni ya yafuatayo: i.

English: The Commission on Revenue Allocation; ii.
Kiswahili: Tume ya Ugawaji wa Mapato; ii.

English: Any other interested persons or groups.
Kiswahili: Watu wengine au vikundi vingine vinavyovutiwa.

English: This is in accordance with Article 201 of the Constitution and Section 35 (2) of the Public Finance Management Act, 2012 which requires public participation on all public finance matters.
Kiswahili: Hii ni kwa mujibu wa Ibara ya 201 ya Katiba na Kifungu cha 35 (2) cha Sheria ya Usimamizi wa Fedha za Umma, 2012 inayotaka ushirikishwaji wa umma katika masuala yote ya fedha za umma.

English: This advertisement is placed for general public information.
Kiswahili: Tangazo hili limewekwa kwa habari ya jumla ya umma.

English: Legislative measures to facilitate funding of County Governments in case the Division of Revenue Bill and the County Allocation of Revenue Bill are not enacted by 30th June so as to prevent cash crisis that could arise and affect delivery of services by County Governments; 2.
Kiswahili: Hatua za kisheria za kuwezesha ufadhili wa Serikali za Kaunti iwapo Mswada wa Mswada wa Mgawanyo wa Mapato na Mswada wa Ugavi wa Mapato ya Kaunti hautapitishwa kufikia tarehe 30 Juni ili kuzuia shida ya pesa ambayo inaweza kuibuka na kuathiri utoaji wa huduma na Serikali za Kaunti; 2.

English: Legislative and administrative reforms to improve social and economic well-being of all Kenyans taking into account the current debt situation and the need for a sustainable public debt position without putting more burden on Kenyans; 3.
Kiswahili: Marekebisho ya sheria na utawala ili kuboresha ustawi wa kijamii na kiuchumi wa Wakenya wote kwa kuzingatia hali ya sasa ya madeni na hitaji la nafasi endelevu ya deni la umma bila kuweka mzigo zaidi kwa Wakenya; 3.

English: Legislation to ensure equity and fairness in taxation, provide tax amnesty where justified and rationalize tax expenditures that erode revenue that would otherwise be used for implementation of projects that improve the welfare of all Kenyans; and 4.
Kiswahili: Sheria za kuhakikisha usawa na usawa katika utozaji ushuru, kutoa msamaha wa ushuru pale inapohalalishwa na kusawazisha matumizi ya ushuru ambayo yanapunguza mapato ambayo yangetumiwa kutekeleza miradi inayoboresha ustawi wa Wakenya wote; na 4.

English: Reforms to enhance tax administration and compliance so as to ensure each taxpayer pay the rightful share of tax through reducing tax evasion and avoidance.
Kiswahili: Marekebisho ya kuimarisha usimamizi na kufuata kodi ili kuhakikisha kila mlipakodi analipa sehemu halali ya kodi kwa kupunguza ukwepaji na kuepuka kodi.

English: The proposals received in the areas listed above will inform reforms to be undertaken in revenue administration and review of legislations by the National Treasury to foster inclusive economic growth for the welfare of all Kenyans for submission to Parliament.
Kiswahili: Mapendekezo yaliyopokelewa katika maeneo yaliyoorodheshwa hapo juu yataarifu mageuzi yatakayofanywa katika usimamizi wa mapato na uhakiki wa sheria na Hazina ya Kitaifa ili kukuza ukuaji wa uchumi jumuishi kwa ustawi wa Wakenya wote ili kuwasilishwa Bungeni.

English: The shocks include d: COVID-19 pandemic and its ensuing effects , conflict in Eastern Europe and Middle East that led to global supply chain disruptions and the adverse effects of climate change from the prolonged drought in 2 021 to the floods in the first half of 2024.
Kiswahili: Mishtuko hiyo ni pamoja na d: Janga la COVID-19 na athari zake zilizofuata, migogoro katika Ulaya Mashariki na Mashariki ya Kati ambayo ilisababisha usumbufu wa usambazaji wa kimataifa na athari mbaya za mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa kutoka kwa ukame wa muda mrefu mnamo 2021 hadi mafuriko katika nusu ya kwanza ya 2024.

English: These shocks escalated the cost of essential household commodities including fuel prices, and led to a rapid depreciation of the Kenya Shilling exchange rate, pilling pressure on public debt.
Kiswahili: Mishtuko hii iliongeza gharama ya bidhaa muhimu za nyumbani ikiwa ni pamoja na bei ya mafuta, na kusababisha kushuka kwa kasi kwa kiwango cha ubadilishaji wa Shilingi ya Kenya, na hivyo kuongeza shinikizo kwenye deni la umma.

English: The Government has implemented policy measures to mitigate these negative shocks and embarked on structural reforms under BETA as articulated in the Fourth Medium Term Plan .
Kiswahili: Serikali imetekeleza hatua za kisera ili kupunguza misukosuko hii hasi na imeanza marekebisho ya kimuundo chini ya BETA kama ilivyoainishwa katika Mpango wa Nne wa Muda wa Kati.

English: BETA targets to bring down the cost of living; eradicat e hunger; create jobs; expand the tax base; and improve foreign exchange balances and inclusive growth , through a value chain approach.
Kiswahili: BETA inalenga kupunguza gharama ya maisha; kuondokana na njaa; kuunda ajira; kupanua wigo wa ushuru; na kuboresha urari wa fedha za kigeni na ukuaji jumuishi, kupitia mbinu ya mnyororo wa thamani.

English: To realize these objectives, special focus will continue to be placed on five pillars with the highest impact to drive and sustain economic recovery as well as household welfare: Agricultural Transformation; Micro, Small and Medium Enterprise s (MSME) Economy; Housing and Settlement; Healthcare; and Digital Superhighway and Creative Economy .
Kiswahili: Ili kufikia malengo haya, mkazo maalum utaendelea kuwekwa kwenye nguzo tano zenye matokeo ya juu zaidi ya kuendesha na kuendeleza ufufuaji wa uchumi pamoja na ustawi wa kaya: Mabadiliko ya Kilimo; Uchumi wa Biashara Ndogo, Ndogo na za Kati (MSME); Makazi na Makazi; Huduma ya afya; na Barabara kuu ya Dijiti na Uchumi Ubunifu.

English: We have now prepared the draft 2024 Budget Review and Outlook Paper for the MTEF FY 202 5/26 - 2027/28 Budget which is available at the National Treasury website (www.treasury.go.ke).
Kiswahili: Sasa tumetayarisha rasimu ya Mapitio ya Bajeti ya 2024 na Mtazamo wa Bajeti ya MTEF FY 202 5/26 - 2027/28 ambayo inapatikana katika tovuti ya Hazina ya Kitaifa (www.treasury.go.ke).

English: The purpose of this Public Notice is to invite comments on the draft 2024 Budget Review and Outlook Paper to enable finalization of the document.
Kiswahili: Madhumuni ya Notisi hii kwa Umma ni kualika maoni kuhusu rasimu ya Mapitio ya Bajeti ya 2024 na Karatasi ya Matarajio ili kuwezesha kukamilishwa kwa hati.

English: Please share your comments with the National Treasury by close of business 23rd September, 2024 through the email address: brop@treasury.go.ke.
Kiswahili: Tafadhali shiriki maoni yako na Hazina ya Kitaifa kufikia mwisho wa biashara tarehe 23 Septemba, 2024 kupitia barua pepe: brop@treasury.go.ke.

English: Article 227 of the Constitution of Kenya requires that when a state organ or any other public entity contracts for goods or services, it shall do so in accordance with a system that is fair equitable transparent, competitive and cost effective.
Kiswahili: Kifungu cha 227 cha Katiba ya Kenya kinataka kwamba wakati chombo cha serikali au shirika lingine lolote la umma likiweka kandarasi za bidhaa au huduma, litafanya hivyo kwa mujibu wa mfumo ambao ni wa usawa wa uwazi, wenye ushindani na wa gharama nafuu.

English: Section 7(1) of the Public Procurement and Asset Disposal Act 2015, (The Act) states that the National Treasury established under section 11 of the Public Finance Management Act 2012 shall be responsible for Public Procurement and Asset Disposal Policy formulation.
Kiswahili: Kifungu cha 7(1) cha Sheria ya Manunuzi ya Umma na Uondoaji Mali ya mwaka 2015, (Sheria) kinasema Hazina ya Taifa iliyoanzishwa chini ya kifungu cha 11 cha Sheria ya Usimamizi wa Fedha za Umma ya mwaka 2012 itawajibika kutunga Sera ya Ununuzi na Usambazaji wa Mali za Umma.

English: Persons interested in submitting comments are requested to scan the QR code that can also be accessed in the National Treasury website www.treasury.go.ke, PPRA website https://ppra.go.ke and KISM website htps://kism.or.ke and complete the feeback form therein.
Kiswahili: Watu wanaotaka kuwasilisha maoni wanaombwa kuchanganua msimbo wa QR ambao unaweza pia kupatikana katika tovuti ya Hazina ya Kitaifa www.treasury.go.ke, tovuti ya PPRA https://ppra.go.ke na tovuti ya KISM htps://kism.or.ke na ujaze fomu ya marejesho humo.

English: Alternatively, persons may submit written memoranda in hard copies, in the format provided for in the National Treasury website, addressed to the Principal Secretary, National Treasury, P .O.
Kiswahili: Vinginevyo, watu wanaweza kuwasilisha memoranda zilizoandikwa katika nakala ngumu, katika muundo uliotolewa katika tovuti ya Hazina ya Kitaifa, iliyotumwa kwa Katibu Mkuu, Hazina ya Kitaifa, P.O.

English: Box 30007 Nairobi-00100 , or email to ppd@treasury.go.ke with a copy to dppd4553@gmail.com to be received by 11th October, 2024.
Kiswahili: Box 30007 Nairobi-00100 , au barua pepe kwa ppd@treasury.go.ke ikiwa na nakala kwa dppd4553@gmail.com itakayopokelewa kufikia tarehe 11 Oktoba, 2024.

English: REPUBLIC OF KENYA THE NATIONAL TREASURY AND ECONOMIC PLANNING PRESS STATEMENT (FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE) 3rd October 2024.
Kiswahili: JAMHURI YA KENYA TAARIFA YA HAZINA YA KITAIFA NA MIPANGO YA UCHUMI (KWA TAARIFA YA HARAKA) tarehe 3 Oktoba 2024.

English: NATIONAL TREASURY INITIATES TRANSITION TO ACCRUAL BASIS ACCOUNTING The National Treasury is pleased to announce the commencement of the transition from cash -basis accounting to the International Public Sector Accounting Standards (IPSAS) accrual basis, marking an important step in public financial management reform.
Kiswahili: HAZINA YA TAIFA YAANZISHA MAPITO YA UHASIBU WA MSINGI UTAYARISHAJI Hazina ya Kitaifa inafuraha kutangaza kuanza kwa mageuzi kutoka kwa uhasibu wa msingi wa fedha kwenda kwa viwango vya kimataifa vya uhasibu katika sekta ya umma (IPSAS), kuashiria hatua muhimu katika mageuzi ya usimamizi wa fedha za umma.

English: This transition will affect the National Government, County Governments, and their respective entities, ensuring greater transparency and accountability in financial reporting.
Kiswahili: Mpito huu utaathiri Serikali ya Kitaifa, Serikali za Kaunti, na huluki zao, kuhakikisha uwazi na uwajibikaji zaidi katika kuripoti fedha.

English: The Cabinet approved this transition on 7 thMarch,2024 following recommendations from the National Treasury and the Publi c Sector Accounting Standards Board (PSASB).
Kiswahili: Baraza la Mawaziri liliidhinisha mabadiliko haya tarehe 7 Machi, 2024 kufuatia mapendekezo kutoka kwa Hazina ya Kitaifa na Bodi ya Viwango vya Uhasibu katika Sekta ya Umma (PSASB).

English: The trans ition was subsequently gazette d on 30th August 2024 (Gazette Notice No. 11033).
Kiswahili: Mabadiliko hayo yalitangazwa kwenye gazeti la serikali tarehe 30 Agosti 2024 ( Notisi ya Gazeti Na. 11033).

English: A steering committee, appointed by the Cabinet Secretary for the National Treasury and Economic Planning, will oversee the process, with the inaugural meeting chaired by the Principal Secretary, National Treasury, held today.
Kiswahili: Kamati ya Uongozi iliyoteuliwa na Katibu wa Baraza la Mawaziri wa Hazina ya Taifa na Mipango ya Uchumi, itasimamia mchakato huo, ambapo kikao cha uzinduzi kikiongozwa na Katibu Mkuu, Hazina ya Taifa, kikifanyika leo.

English: This shift from cash to accrual accounting represents a milestone in Kenya’s efforts to align its financial reporting with global standards.
Kiswahili: Mabadiliko haya kutoka pesa taslimu hadi uhasibu wa ziada yanawakilisha hatua muhimu katika juhudi za Kenya kuoanisha ripoti yake ya kifedha na viwango vya kimataifa.

English: Under cash accounting, financial transactions are recorded only when cash is exchanged, which, while straightforward, limits the government’s ability to present a comprehensive view of its financial position.
Kiswahili: Chini ya uhasibu wa fedha, shughuli za kifedha zinarekodi tu wakati fedha zinapobadilishwa, ambayo, wakati wa moja kwa moja, hupunguza uwezo wa serikali wa kuwasilisha mtazamo wa kina wa hali yake ya kifedha.

English: As the complexity of public finances grows, these limitations become more pronounced.
Kiswahili: Kadiri ugumu wa fedha za umma unavyoongezeka, mapungufu haya yanaonekana zaidi.

English: Accrual accounting addresses this by recognizing revenues and expenses when they are earned or incurred, regardless of when cash is exchanged.
Kiswahili: Uhasibu wa ziada hushughulikia hili kwa kutambua mapato na matumizi yanapopatikana au yanayotumika, bila kujali wakati pesa inabadilishwa.

English: The Virtual Asset Service Providers Bill, 2025 1 THE VIRTUAL ASSET SERVICE PROVIDERS BILL, 2025 ARRANGEMENT OF CLAUSES Clause PART I─PRELIMINARY 1— Short title. 2— Interpretation. 3— Meaning of “virtual asset service provider”. 4— Objects of the Act. 5— Scope of application.

Kiswahili: SEHEMU YA II - UTEUZI WA MAMLAKA ZA USIMAMIZI 6- Mamlaka za udhibiti. 7- Kazi za mamlaka husika za udhibiti. 8- Kanuni elekezi za mamlaka husika ya udhibiti.

Kiswahili: Muswada wa Mswada wa Watoa Huduma za Mali, 2025 2 30— Wajibu wa kuandaa taarifa za fedha zilizokaguliwa za kila mwaka. 31- Uteuzi wa afisa mkuu mtendaji. 32— Wajibu wa kulinda mali ya mteja.

Kiswahili: SEHEMU YA V - KUZUIA UKATILI WA FEDHA, Ufadhili wa UGAIDI NA UFADHILI WA UENEZAJI KWA MTOA HUDUMA AINA YA MALI 33— Mamlaka ya mamlaka husika ya udhibiti kwa madhumuni ya AML/CFT/CPF. 34- Adhabu kwa ukiukaji unaohusiana na utakatishaji fedha, ufadhili wa ugaidi.

English: PART VIINITIAL VIRTUAL ASSET OFFERING 35— Issuers of initial virtual asset offering PART VII — INVESTIGATION AND EXAMINATION 36— Compliance, inspection and investigation. 37— Appointment or designation of examiner. 38— General powers to request information. 39— Additional powers.
Kiswahili: SEHEMU YA SABA YA OFA YA MALI HALISI 35— Watoaji wa mali ya awali ya mtandaoni inayotoa SEHEMU YA VII - UCHUNGUZI NA MTIHANI WA 36— Utii, ukaguzi na uchunguzi. 37- Uteuzi au uteuzi wa mtahini. 38- Mamlaka ya jumla ya kuomba habari. 39- Mamlaka ya ziada.

English: Section 23 (1) of the Wildlife Conservation and Management Act, 2013 (as amended) establishes the Wildlife Conservation Trust Fund.
Kiswahili: Kifungu cha 23 (1) cha Sheria ya Uhifadhi na Usimamizi wa Wanyamapori, 2013 (kama ilivyorekebishwa) kinaanzisha Mfuko wa Udhamini wa Uhifadhi wa Wanyamapori.

English: The Board of the Wildlife Conservation Trust Fund and the National Treasury have now finalized the draft Public Finance Management (Wildlife Conservation Trust Fund) Regulations, 2024.
Kiswahili: Bodi ya Mfuko wa Hifadhi ya Wanyamapori na Hazina ya Kitaifa sasa imekamilisha rasimu ya Kanuni za Usimamizi wa Fedha za Umma (Wildlife Conservation Trust Fund) za mwaka 2024.

English: The proposed Public Finance Management ( Wildlife Conservation Trust Fund ) Regulations, 2024 have been posted to the National Treasury website http://www.treasury.go.ke.
Kiswahili: Kanuni zinazopendekezwa za Usimamizi wa Fedha za Umma ( Wildlife Conservation Trust Fund ), 2024 zimewekwa kwenye tovuti ya Hazina ya Kitaifa http://www.treasury.go.ke.

English: The comments, inputs, or memoranda thereof from the general public may be forwarded to the Principal Secretary, National Treasury, P.
Kiswahili: Maoni, michango, au memoranda zake kutoka kwa umma kwa ujumla zinaweza kutumwa kwa Katibu Mkuu, Hazina ya Kitaifa, P.

English: Comments are most helpful if they indicate the specific regulation or group of regulations to which they relate, contain a clear rationale , and where applicable provide a suggestion for alternative wording.
Kiswahili: Maoni husaidia sana ikiwa yanaonyesha kanuni mahususi au kundi la kanuni ambalo yanahusiana nayo, yana mantiki iliyo wazi , na inapotumika kutoa pendekezo la maneno mbadala.

English: These Regulations may be cited as the Sports, Arts and Social Development Fund (Amendment) Regulations, 2024.
Kiswahili: Kanuni hizi zinaweza kutajwa kuwa Kanuni za Mfuko wa Michezo, Sanaa na Maendeleo ya Jamii (Marekebisho) za 2024.

English: Regulation 1 of the Public Finance Management (Sports, Arts and Social Development Fund) Regulations, 2018 , hereinafter referred to as the “principal Regulations” is amended by deleting the words “Arts and Social Development” appearing immediately after the word “Sports” and substituting therefor the words “and Arts”. 3.
Kiswahili: Kanuni ya 1 ya Kanuni za Usimamizi wa Fedha za Umma (Michezo, Sanaa na Mfuko wa Maendeleo ya Jamii) za mwaka 2018, ambazo zitajulikana baadaye kama “Kanuni kuu” inafanyiwa marekebisho kwa kufuta maneno “Sanaa na Maendeleo ya Jamii” yanayoonekana mara baada ya neno “Michezo” na kuweka badala ya maneno “na Sanaa”. 3.

English: Regulation 3 of the principal Regulations is amended by deleting the words “Arts and Social Development” appearing immediately after the word “Sports” and substituting therefor the words “and Arts”. 5.
Kiswahili: Kanuni ya 3 ya Kanuni kuu inarekebishwa kwa kufuta maneno “Sanaa na Maendeleo ya Jamii” yanayoonekana mara baada ya neno “Michezo” na badala yake maneno “na Sanaa”. 5.

English: Regulation 9 of the principal Regulations is amended in paragraph (b)─ (a) by deleting the word “knowledge and”. (b) by deleting subparagraph (vi) and substituting therefor the following new paragraph─ (vi) arts; 9.
Kiswahili: Kanuni ya 9 ya Kanuni kuu inarekebishwa katika aya (b)─ (a) kwa kufuta neno "maarifa na". (b) kwa kufuta ibara ndogo ya (vi) na kuweka badala yake aya mpya ifuatayo─ (vi) sanaa; 9.

English: Regulation 11 of the principal Regulations is amended in subregulation (1) by deleting the words “accounting ofﬁcer responsible for matters relating to sports” and substituting the words “Chief Executive Officer”. 11.
Kiswahili: Kanuni ya 11 ya Kanuni kuu inarekebishwa katika kanuni ndogo ya (1) kwa kufuta maneno “afisa mhasibu anayehusika na masuala yanayohusu michezo” na kuweka badala ya maneno “Afisa Mtendaji Mkuu”. 11.

Kiswahili: The Government Owned Enterprises Bill, 2024 1 MUSWADA WA USHIRIKA UNAOMILIKIWA NA SERIKALI, 2024 MPANGILIO WA VIFUNGO SEHEMU YA I─AWALI 1—Jina fupi. 2 - Tafsiri. 3 - Malengo ya Sheria hii. 4- Maombi. 5- Wajibu wa Katibu wa Baraza la Mawaziri kwa Hazina ya Kitaifa. 6- Wajibu wa Katibu wa Baraza la Mawaziri husika.

Kiswahili: SEHEMU YA PILI—UTARATIBU NA VIGEZO VYA KUANZISHA BIASHARA INAYOMILIKIWA NA SERIKALI 7— Kanuni elekezi za uanzishaji wa Mashirika Yanayomilikiwa na Serikali. 8- Utaratibu wa kuanzishwa kwa Biashara Inayomilikiwa na Serikali. 9- Sifa za Biashara Inayomilikiwa na Serikali.

English: PART IV—PERFORMANCE 26—Business Plan. 27—Performance management. 28—Performance evaluation.
Kiswahili: SEHEMU YA IV—UTENDAJI 26—Mpango wa Biashara. 27 - Usimamizi wa utendaji. 28-Tathmini ya utendaji.

English: The Government Owned Enterprises Bill, 2024 2 PART V—PUBLIC SERVICE OBLIGATIONS 29— Public Service Obligations. 30—Proposals. 31— Implementation of Public Service Obligations.
Kiswahili: The Government Owned Enterprises Bill, 2024 2 SEHEMU YA V—MAJUKUMU YA UTUMISHI WA UMMA 29— ​​Majukumu ya Utumishi wa Umma. 30-Mapendekezo. 31- Utekelezaji wa Majukumu ya Utumishi wa Umma.

English: PART VI – REPORTING AND DISCLOSURE 32— Reporting. 33— Disclosure. 34—Financial transparency.
Kiswahili: SEHEMU YA VI – KURIPOTI NA KUFICHUA 32— Kuripoti. 33- Kufichua. 34 - Uwazi wa kifedha.

English: The Policy is aligned to the Fourth Medium -Term Plan (2023 -2027) of the Kenya Vision 2030 that prioritizes implementation of economic recovery strategies under the Government’s BottomUp Economic Transformation Agenda (BETA) .
Kiswahili: Sera hiyo inapatanishwa na Mpango wa Nne wa Muda wa Kati (2023 -2027) wa Dira ya 2030 ya Kenya ambayo inatanguliza utekelezwaji wa mikakati ya kufufua uchumi chini ya Agenda ya Serikali ya Mabadiliko ya Kiuchumi (BETA) .

English: BETA focuses on interventions that reduce cost of living; increase employment; incentivize investment and production; achieve more equitable distribution of income; enhance social security ; expand tax base; and increase foreign exchange earnings.
Kiswahili: BETA inazingatia afua zinazopunguza gharama ya maisha; kuongeza ajira; kuhamasisha uwekezaji na uzalishaji; kufikia mgawanyo sawa wa mapato; kuimarisha usalama wa kijamii; kupanua wigo wa ushuru; na kuongeza mapato ya fedha za kigeni.

English: The Policy is developed against a background of tight fiscal space occasioned by emergi ng expenditure pressures arising from drought related expenditures and external shocks, and financing constraints due to tight liquidity conditions .
Kiswahili: Sera inaundwa dhidi ya historia ya nafasi finyu ya kifedha inayosababishwa na shinikizo zinazojitokeza za matumizi zinazotokana na matumizi yanayohusiana na ukame na majanga ya nje, na vikwazo vya kifedha kutokana na hali ngumu ya ukwasi.

English: At the same time, revenue collection, as a share of Gross Domestic Product ( GDP) continues to decline .
Kiswahili: Wakati huo huo, ukusanyaji wa mapato, kama sehemu ya Pato la Taifa ( Pato la Taifa ) unaendelea kupungua.

English: This is attributed to various challenges, among them ; increase in tax incentives, low tax compliance, continued effects of COVID -19 pandemic, growth of the informal sector and increased use of technology in contemporary business models, both of which are difficult to tax.
Kiswahili: Hii inachangiwa na changamoto mbalimbali, miongoni mwao; ongezeko la vivutio vya kodi, uzingatiaji mdogo wa kodi, kuendelea kwa athari za janga la COVID-19, ukuaji wa sekta isiyo rasmi na kuongezeka kwa matumizi ya teknolojia katika miundo ya kisasa ya biashara, ambayo ni vigumu kutozwa kodi.

English: CPA JOHN MBADI NG’ONGO, EGH CABINET SECRETARY PUBLIC NOTICE INVITATION TO SUBMIT COMMENTS, VIEWS AND MEMORANDA ON POSSIBLE AREAS FOR AMENDMENTS TO THE PUBLIC PROCURMENT AND ASSET DISPOSAL ACT 2015
Kiswahili: CPA JOHN MBADI NG’ONGO, EGH KATIBU WA BARAZA LA MAWAZIRI TAARIFA KWA UMMA KUWASILISHA MAONI, MAONI NA KUMBUKUMBU JUU YA MAENEO YANAYOWEZEKANA KWA MABADILIKO YA SHERIA YA MANUNUZI NA UTUMAJI WA MALI YA UMMA 2015.
